narrative: During week 10, the agent completed 47 literature searches across 3 research domains (quantum computing, post-quantum cryptography, and AI safety). Twelve high-relevance papers were identified and summarized. Two draft emails were prepared for collaborator outreach, both approved and sent by the principal. One advisory was issued regarding a proposed database subscription (pending response).
decision_summary: All actions within delegated authority. One advisory escalated for human review (subscription purchase). No policy violations detected. API rate limits respected with 89% utilization during peak hours.
